annotations.text: This Software Bill-of-Materials (SBOM) document was created on Sunday, February 8, 2026 with cdxgen. The data was captured during the build lifecycle phase. The document describes an application named 'gh_docs_bot'. There are 291 components. 2 package type(s) and 40 purl namespaces are described in the document under components.
